goals: 系統定位：平台型 Marketplace，提供多賣家商品展示、聚合結帳、按賣家拆單（SubOrder）工作流、金流收款與延遲結算、售後（取消/退款/糾紛）與稽核能力。
核心目標：讓訪客可瀏覽與搜尋商品、買家可完成聚合結帳與付款、賣家可管理商品與售後、平台管理員可介入審核與營運管理。
必備能力：登入與 RBAC、合法狀態機轉換、付款 callback 冪等、庫存一致性與完整稽核。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 Login Page 具有階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 到 page_login 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 Signup Page 具有階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 到 page_signup 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 Cart Page 具有階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 到 page_cart 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: Entry 與 Checkout Page 具有階層關係

narrative.summary: Entry 與 Payment Result Page 具有階層關係
narrative.taskDescription: 建立 page_entry 到 page_payment_result 的 parent/child 關聯。

narrative.summary: 從 Entry 導向 Catalog Page
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Entry.Init 觸發 continueAsVisitor，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: navigating to / returns 200 and opens the catalog entry state with only active non-banned products visible in list context

narrative.summary: 從 Entry 導向 Login Page
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Entry.Init 觸發 chooseLogin，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: navigating to /login returns 200, login form fields and submit CTA are visible, and this page does not render a duplicate primary login CTA outside the form/header pattern

narrative.summary: 從 Entry 導向 Signup Page
narrative.taskDescription: 在 Entry.Init 觸發 chooseSignup，並進入 SignupPage.Init。

validations.description: navigating to /signup returns 200, signup form fields and submit CTA are visible, and this page does not render a duplicate primary signup CTA outside the form/header pattern

narrative.summary: 進入商品列表狀態
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter / with active products，讓流程由 CatalogPage.Init 進入 CatalogPage.ListReady。

validations.description: catalog list API returns 200 and only products with status active and not banned are rendered with product cards and detail CTAs

source.raw: CatalogPage.Init --> CatalogPage.ListReady : enter / with active products

narrative.summary: 進入搜尋結果狀態
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /search with matched products，讓流程由 CatalogPage.Init 進入 CatalogPage.SearchReady。

validations.description: search API returns 200 with query and filter conditions applied, matched products are rendered, and the result set is consistent with title description category and price filters

source.raw: CatalogPage.Init --> CatalogPage.SearchReady : enter /search with matched products

narrative.summary: 進入空搜尋狀態
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /search with no matched products，讓流程由 CatalogPage.Init 進入 CatalogPage.SearchEmpty。

validations.description: search API returns 200 with zero results, empty state messaging is shown, and no stale product cards remain visible

source.raw: CatalogPage.Init --> CatalogPage.SearchEmpty : enter /search with no matched products

narrative.summary: 進入可購買商品詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /products/:productId with available product，讓流程由 CatalogPage.Init 進入 CatalogPage.DetailReady。

validations.description: product detail API returns 200, UI renders title price purchasable status stock or availability and seller shop_name, and the product is not banned

source.raw: CatalogPage.Init --> CatalogPage.DetailReady : enter /products/:productId with available product

transitions.event: enter /products/:productId with banned or missing product

narrative.summary: 進入不可用商品詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /products/:productId with banned or missing product，讓流程由 CatalogPage.Init 進入 CatalogPage.DetailUnavailable。

validations.description: unavailable product access returns 404 or the agreed unavailable state consistently, purchase CTA is not usable, and banned products are not exposed as purchasable items

intent.summary: enter /products/:productId with banned or missing product

source.raw: CatalogPage.Init --> CatalogPage.DetailUnavailable : enter /products/:productId with banned or missing product

narrative.summary: 從列表切到搜尋入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openSearch | navigate /search，讓流程由 CatalogPage.ListReady 回到 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to /search, search inputs become visible, and the catalog list view is replaced by the search view without duplicate search CTAs

narrative.summary: 從列表切到商品詳情入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openProduct | navigate /products/:productId，讓流程由 CatalogPage.ListReady 回到 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: clicked product id matches the destination route, detail request is issued for that product, and the destination page can render product information for the selected item

narrative.summary: 更新搜尋條件
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 refineSearch | navigate /search，讓流程由 CatalogPage.SearchReady 回到 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: updated query or filters trigger a new search request, the result set refreshes to match the new conditions, and previous results do not persist incorrectly

narrative.summary: 從搜尋結果切到商品詳情入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openProduct | navigate /products/:productId，讓流程由 CatalogPage.SearchReady 回到 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: selecting a search result navigates to the matching product detail route and preserves the chosen product identity

narrative.summary: 空搜尋後調整篩選
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 changeFilters | navigate /search，讓流程由 CatalogPage.SearchEmpty 回到 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: filter controls remain interactive in empty state, a new search request is sent with revised conditions, and the page leaves empty state only when results exist

narrative.summary: 由空搜尋回到列表入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 backToList | navigate /，讓流程由 CatalogPage.SearchEmpty 回到 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: route changes back to /, public list content reloads, and list cards are restored from active non-banned products only

narrative.summary: 由不可用詳情回到商品列表
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 backToCatalog | navigate /，讓流程由 CatalogPage.DetailUnavailable 回到 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to catalog clears the unavailable detail state and restores the public list page with available products only

narrative.summary: Catalog Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_catalog 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 從商品詳情進入加入購物車功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CatalogPage.DetailReady 觸發 addToCartAsBuyer，並進入 AddCartFeature.Init。

validations.description: only Buyer can trigger add-to-cart, request includes the current product and quantity at least 1, and product status must still be active before entering the feature

narrative.summary: 訪客從商品詳情導向登入
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CatalogPage.DetailReady 觸發 addToCartAsVisitor，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: Visitor attempting add-to-cart is redirected to /login, backend returns 401 for protected cart action, and no Cart CartItem Order or Payment record is created

narrative.summary: 買家從商品詳情打開購物車
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CatalogPage.DetailReady 觸發 openCartAsBuyer，並進入 CartPage.Init。

validations.description: Buyer navigation to /cart returns 200, cart page entry loads only the current buyer cart, and no other user's cart data is visible

narrative.summary: 顯示登入表單
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 showLoginForm，讓流程由 LoginPage.Init 進入 LoginPage.Ready。

validations.description: form inputs are enabled, inline validation area is available, and the page contains a single primary login submission path without duplicate CTA placement

narrative.summary: Login Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_login 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 從登入頁提交登入功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Ready 觸發 submitLogin，並進入 AuthLoginFeature.Init。

validations.description: submitting credentials sends the authentication request, submit UI enters a submitting state to prevent double submit, and only the login feature handles role resolution

narrative.summary: 從登入頁切到註冊頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Ready 觸發 openSignup，並進入 SignupPage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to /signup, signup form becomes the active auth UI, and login-specific errors or field values do not leak into the signup entry view unless intentionally preserved

narrative.summary: 從登入頁取消回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 LoginPage.Ready 觸發 cancelLogin，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: canceling login returns to the public catalog route and removes the auth-focused page from the current view

narrative.summary: 顯示註冊表單
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 showSignupForm，讓流程由 SignupPage.Init 進入 SignupPage.Ready。

validations.description: signup fields are editable, validation hints are available, and the page exposes a single primary signup action without duplicate CTA placement

narrative.summary: Signup Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_signup 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 從註冊頁提交註冊功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SignupPage.Ready 觸發 submitSignup，並進入 AuthSignupFeature.Init。

validations.description: signup submission sends account creation request, submit UI prevents duplicate submission, and no authenticated Buyer Seller or Platform Admin session is created before success

narrative.summary: 從註冊頁切到登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SignupPage.Ready 觸發 openLogin，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to /login and the login form becomes the active auth screen with no duplicate auth CTA confusion

narrative.summary: 從註冊頁取消回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SignupPage.Ready 觸發 cancelSignup，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: canceling signup returns to the public catalog and leaves no partial authenticated state behind

narrative.summary: 購物車載入成功
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterWithItems，讓流程由 CartPage.Init 進入 CartPage.Ready。

validations.description: cart API returns 200 for the current buyer, only this buyer's cart items are shown, each quantity is at least 1, and inactive draft banned products are not accepted as valid cart entries

narrative.summary: 購物車為空
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterWithoutItems，讓流程由 CartPage.Init 進入 CartPage.Empty。

validations.description: cart API returns 200 with zero items, empty state UI is shown, and checkout CTA is not offered as a primary path from an empty cart

narrative.summary: Cart Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_cart 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入進購物車導向登入
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CartPage.Init 觸發 enterWithoutBuyer，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated cart access returns 401 and redirects to /login, while authenticated non-Buyer access is not granted cart operations

narrative.summary: 從購物車進入變更功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CartPage.Ready 觸發 updateCartItem，並進入 CartMutateFeature.Init。

validations.description: cart mutation request targets only the current buyer cart item, requested quantity changes respect stock and minimum quantity rules, and mutation is blocked for unavailable products

narrative.summary: 從購物車前往結帳
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CartPage.Ready 觸發 proceedCheckout，並進入 CheckoutPage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to /checkout, buyer context is preserved, and the next page will revalidate product active state and stock before order creation

narrative.summary: 從購物車繼續購物
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CartPage.Ready 觸發 continueShopping，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to catalog leaves existing buyer cart persisted and reopens the public product browsing route

narrative.summary: 空購物車返回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CartPage.Empty 觸發 goBrowseProducts，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: empty cart state can navigate back to catalog and does not create any order payment or suborder data

narrative.summary: 結帳資料可用
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterWithValidCart，讓流程由 CheckoutPage.Init 進入 CheckoutPage.Ready。

validations.description: checkout summary API returns 200, only current buyer cart lines are included, each product remains active, and stock is sufficient at page entry time

narrative.summary: 結帳被不可用商品阻擋
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterWithUnavailableItems，讓流程由 CheckoutPage.Init 進入 CheckoutPage.Blocked。

validations.description: unavailable or insufficient-stock items are explicitly identified in UI, order creation is blocked, and buyer is told to adjust cart instead of creating partial unauthorized orders

narrative.summary: Checkout Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_checkout 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入進結帳導向登入
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CheckoutPage.Init 觸發 enterWithoutBuyer，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated checkout access returns 401 and redirects to /login, and no Order SubOrder or Payment record is created

narrative.summary: 無有效購物車項目返回購物車
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CheckoutPage.Init 觸發 enterWithoutCartItems，並進入 CartPage.Init。

validations.description: when no valid cart items exist the flow routes back to /cart and checkout cannot proceed

narrative.summary: 從結帳頁進入建單付款功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CheckoutPage.Ready 觸發 submitCheckout，並進入 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.Init。

validations.description: submitting checkout starts the create-order flow exactly once, the request uses current buyer cart data, and validation rechecks product active state stock and seller grouping before creation

narrative.summary: 結帳頁返回購物車
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CheckoutPage.Ready 觸發 backToCart，並進入 CartPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to cart preserves current buyer cart state and does not create any partial order payment or suborder records

narrative.summary: 被阻擋的結帳返回購物車
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CheckoutPage.Blocked 觸發 adjustCart，並進入 CartPage.Init。

validations.description: blocked checkout sends buyer back to cart to resolve unavailable items and leaves all Order SubOrder Payment data unchanged

source.sectionTitle: ⑦ Payment Result Page State Machine

narrative.summary: 進入付款成功結果
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterSuccessResult，讓流程由 PaymentResultPage.Init 進入 PaymentResultPage.Success。

validations.description: payment result payload shows succeeded status, success message is visible, and the related order context is available for navigating to orders

narrative.summary: 進入付款失敗結果
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterFailedResult，讓流程由 PaymentResultPage.Init 進入 PaymentResultPage.Failed。

validations.description: payment result payload shows failed status, failure messaging is visible, and retry/back-to-checkout options are available

narrative.summary: 進入付款取消結果
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterCancelledResult，讓流程由 PaymentResultPage.Init 進入 PaymentResultPage.Cancelled。

validations.description: payment result payload shows cancelled status, cancelled messaging is visible, and retry/back-to-checkout options are available without marking the order as paid

narrative.summary: Payment Result Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_payment_result 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入進付款結果導向登入
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentResultPage.Init 觸發 enterWithoutBuyer，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated payment-result access returns 401 and redirects to /login

narrative.summary: 付款成功後查看訂單
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentResultPage.Success 觸發 viewOrders，並進入 OrdersPage.Init。

validations.description: navigating to /orders after success loads only the current buyer orders and includes the newly paid order in a consistent status view

narrative.summary: 付款失敗後重試付款
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentResultPage.Failed 觸發 retryPayment，並進入 PaymentRetryFeature.Init。

validations.description: retry is available only for failed payment state, the existing order remains created with suborders pending_payment, and retry enters the payment retry feature instead of creating a duplicate order

narrative.summary: 付款取消後重試付款
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentResultPage.Cancelled 觸發 retryPayment，並進入 PaymentRetryFeature.Init。

validations.description: retry is available only for cancelled payment state, the existing order remains created with suborders pending_payment, and retry does not duplicate payment success effects

narrative.summary: 付款失敗返回結帳
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentResultPage.Failed 觸發 backToCheckout，並進入 CheckoutPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to checkout from failed result preserves the same buyer context and allows review before retrying payment

narrative.summary: 付款取消返回結帳
narrative.taskDescription: 在 PaymentResultPage.Cancelled 觸發 backToCheckout，並進入 CheckoutPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to checkout from cancelled result does not mark payment as succeeded and allows buyer to restart payment intentionally

narrative.summary: 進入有資料的訂單列表
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /orders with orders，讓流程由 OrdersPage.Init 進入 OrdersPage.ListReady。

validations.description: orders API returns 200 and only the current buyer's orders are listed with aggregated order statuses consistent with their suborders

narrative.summary: 進入空訂單列表
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /orders without orders，讓流程由 OrdersPage.Init 進入 OrdersPage.ListEmpty。

validations.description: orders API returns 200 with zero orders, empty state UI is shown, and no stale order rows remain visible

narrative.summary: 進入訂單詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /orders/:orderId with owned order，讓流程由 OrdersPage.Init 進入 OrdersPage.DetailReady。

validations.description: order detail API returns 200 only for the current buyer's order, order amount and status are shown, and suborder rows belong to that order only

source.raw: OrdersPage.Init --> OrdersPage.DetailReady : enter /orders/:orderId with owned order

narrative.summary: 進入子訂單詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /orders/:orderId/suborders/:subOrderId with owned suborder，讓流程由 OrdersPage.Init 進入 OrdersPage.SubOrderReady。

validations.description: suborder detail API returns 200 only for the current buyer-owned suborder, status and after-sales entry are shown, and cross-user resource access is blocked with 403 or 404 consistently

source.raw: OrdersPage.Init --> OrdersPage.SubOrderReady : enter /orders/:orderId/suborders/:subOrderId with owned suborder

narrative.summary: 進入可評價表單
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /reviews/new with delivered product，讓流程由 OrdersPage.Init 進入 OrdersPage.ReviewDraft。

validations.description: delivered purchase eligibility check passes, review form is available, and the product belongs to a delivered transaction of the current buyer

source.raw: OrdersPage.Init --> OrdersPage.ReviewDraft : enter /reviews/new with delivered product

narrative.summary: 進入不可評價阻擋狀態
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /reviews/new without delivered product，讓流程由 OrdersPage.Init 進入 OrdersPage.ReviewBlocked。

validations.description: review eligibility check fails, review submission is blocked, and UI communicates that only delivered transaction items can be reviewed

source.raw: OrdersPage.Init --> OrdersPage.ReviewBlocked : enter /reviews/new without delivered product

narrative.summary: 由列表切回訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openOrder | navigate /orders/:orderId，讓流程由 OrdersPage.ListReady 回到 OrdersPage.Init。

validations.description: selected order id matches the destination route and detail view resolves only if the order belongs to the current buyer

narrative.summary: 由訂單詳情切回子訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openSubOrder | navigate /orders/:orderId/suborders/:subOrderId，讓流程由 OrdersPage.DetailReady 回到 OrdersPage.Init。

validations.description: selected suborder belongs to the displayed order and route parameters identify the same buyer-owned resources

narrative.summary: 由訂單詳情返回訂單列表入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 backToOrders | navigate /orders，讓流程由 OrdersPage.DetailReady 回到 OrdersPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to /orders restores the buyer order list view and preserves current data consistency

narrative.summary: 由子訂單詳情切回評價入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openReviewForm | navigate /reviews/new?productId=:productId，讓流程由 OrdersPage.SubOrderReady 回到 OrdersPage.Init。

validations.description: review form route uses the selected product id from the delivered transaction item and only opens when review eligibility is satisfied

narrative.summary: 由子訂單詳情回到訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 backToOrderDetail | navigate /orders/:orderId，讓流程由 OrdersPage.SubOrderReady 回到 OrdersPage.Init。

validations.description: route returns to the parent order detail and the selected order still belongs to the current buyer

narrative.summary: 取消評價並返回子訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 cancelReview | navigate /orders/:orderId/suborders/:subOrderId，讓流程由 OrdersPage.ReviewDraft 回到 OrdersPage.Init。

validations.description: canceling review returns to the same buyer-owned suborder detail without creating any Review record

narrative.summary: 由評價阻擋狀態返回子訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 backToSubOrder | navigate /orders/:orderId/suborders/:subOrderId，讓流程由 OrdersPage.ReviewBlocked 回到 OrdersPage.Init。

validations.description: blocked review state routes back to the current buyer-owned suborder detail and leaves review data unchanged

narrative.summary: Orders Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_orders 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入進訂單頁導向登入
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrdersPage.Init 觸發 enterWithoutBuyer，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated access to /orders or child routes returns 401 and redirects to /login

narrative.summary: 訂單列表返回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrdersPage.ListReady 觸發 goBrowseProducts，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: leaving orders for catalog does not change existing order data and reopens the public catalog route

narrative.summary: 空訂單列表返回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrdersPage.ListEmpty 觸發 startShopping，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: empty orders state can navigate back to catalog and no order detail route remains selected

narrative.summary: 從訂單詳情進入取消功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrdersPage.DetailReady 觸發 cancelBeforePayment，並進入 OrderCancelFeature.Init。

validations.description: cancel action is offered only before payment, target order is buyer-owned, and the feature receives the current order in created or pending-payment related state only

narrative.summary: 從子訂單詳情進入退款申請功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrdersPage.SubOrderReady 觸發 requestRefund，並進入 RefundRequestFeature.Init。

validations.description: refund entry is offered only for allowed paid shipped or delivered suborder states within the permitted rules and only for the current buyer's suborder

narrative.summary: 從評價草稿進入評價建立功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 OrdersPage.ReviewDraft 觸發 submitReview，並進入 ReviewCreateFeature.Init。

validations.description: review submission includes rating and comment for the delivered product only, and the feature is entered only for buyer-owned delivered transactions

source.sectionTitle: ⑨ Seller Console Page State Machine

transitions.event: enter /seller/apply as buyer without seller role

narrative.summary: 進入賣家申請頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /seller/apply as buyer without seller role，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.ApplyReady。

validations.description: buyer without seller role can access seller apply page, application form fields like shop_name are shown, and seller-only product order settlement data is not shown

intent.summary: enter /seller/apply as buyer without seller role

source.raw: SellerConsolePage.Init --> SellerConsolePage.ApplyReady : enter /seller/apply as buyer without seller role

narrative.summary: 進入賣家商品管理
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /seller/products as seller，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.ProductsReady。

validations.description: seller products API returns 200, only the current seller's products are listed, and no other seller product records are visible

narrative.summary: 進入新增商品草稿頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /seller/products/new as seller，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.ProductNewDraft。

validations.description: seller product creation form is visible only to the current seller and supports product fields required for draft active inactive management

narrative.summary: 進入編輯商品草稿頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /seller/products/:productId/edit as owner seller，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.ProductEditDraft。

validations.description: product edit API returns 200 only when the product belongs to the current seller, and cross-seller editing is blocked with 403 or 404 consistently

source.raw: SellerConsolePage.Init --> SellerConsolePage.ProductEditDraft : enter /seller/products/:productId/edit as owner seller

narrative.summary: 進入賣家訂單列表
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /seller/orders as seller，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.OrdersReady。

validations.description: seller order list API returns 200 and shows only suborders owned by the current seller

narrative.summary: 進入賣家子訂單詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /seller/orders/:subOrderId as owner seller，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.OrderDetailReady。

validations.description: seller suborder detail API returns 200 only for current seller-owned suborders and exposes shipment and after-sales actions according to status

source.raw: SellerConsolePage.Init --> SellerConsolePage.OrderDetailReady : enter /seller/orders/:subOrderId as owner seller

narrative.summary: 進入賣家結算列表
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /seller/settlements as seller，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.SettlementsReady。

validations.description: settlement list API returns 200 and shows only current seller settlement rows with gross_amount platform_fee net_amount and status

narrative.summary: 進入賣家結算詳情
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /seller/settlements/:settlementId as owner seller，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.SettlementDetailReady。

validations.description: settlement detail API returns 200 only for current seller-owned settlement and shows immutable settled records consistently

source.raw: SellerConsolePage.Init --> SellerConsolePage.SettlementDetailReady : enter /seller/settlements/:settlementId as owner seller

narrative.summary: 進入賣家區權限不足狀態
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterSellerRouteWithoutPermission，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.Init 進入 SellerConsolePage.Forbidden。

validations.description: authenticated non-seller access to seller-only routes returns 403, forbidden state is shown, and seller-only data remains hidden

narrative.summary: 由商品列表切到新增商品入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openNewProduct | navigate /seller/products/new，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.ProductsReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to the product creation page for the current seller and no existing product is modified

narrative.summary: 由商品列表切到編輯商品入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openEditProduct | navigate /seller/products/:productId/edit，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.ProductsReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: selected product belongs to the current seller and the edit route uses that product id only

narrative.summary: 由商品列表切到賣家訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openSellerOrders | navigate /seller/orders，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.ProductsReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to seller orders and the seller context remains the same without exposing other sellers' data

narrative.summary: 由商品列表切到結算入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openSettlements | navigate /seller/settlements，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.ProductsReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to settlement list and retains the current seller scope only

narrative.summary: 取消新增商品並返回列表入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 cancelProductCreate | navigate /seller/products，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.ProductNewDraft 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: canceling product creation returns to seller product list and does not persist a new Product record

narrative.summary: 取消編輯商品並返回列表入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 cancelProductEdit | navigate /seller/products，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.ProductEditDraft 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: canceling product edit returns to seller product list and does not persist unsaved product changes

narrative.summary: 由賣家訂單列表切到子訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openSellerOrderDetail | navigate /seller/orders/:subOrderId，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.OrdersReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: selected suborder belongs to the current seller and the detail route points to that suborder only

narrative.summary: 由賣家訂單列表返回商品入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openProducts | navigate /seller/products，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.OrdersReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: seller can return from orders list to product list without changing any suborder data

narrative.summary: 由子訂單詳情返回賣家訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 backToSellerOrders | navigate /seller/orders，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.OrderDetailReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: returning to seller order list preserves seller scope and does not modify the suborder state

narrative.summary: 由結算列表切到結算詳情入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openSettlementDetail | navigate /seller/settlements/:settlementId，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.SettlementsReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: selected settlement belongs to the current seller and the detail route references that settlement only

narrative.summary: 由結算列表返回商品入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openProducts | navigate /seller/products，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.SettlementsReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: returning from settlement list to product list keeps seller scope and does not alter settlement values

narrative.summary: 由結算詳情返回結算入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 backToSettlements | navigate /seller/settlements，讓流程由 SellerConsolePage.SettlementDetailReady 回到 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: back navigation restores the settlement list and keeps gross_amount platform_fee net_amount status consistent with detail data

narrative.summary: Seller Console Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_seller_console 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入進賣家區導向登入
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.Init 觸發 enterWithoutSession，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated /seller/* access returns 401 and redirects to /login with no seller data exposed

narrative.summary: 由賣家申請頁進入申請提交功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.ApplyReady 觸發 submitSellerApplication，並進入 SellerApplicationSubmitFeature.Init。

validations.description: application submission includes buyer-owned identity and shop_name data only, and entering the feature does not grant seller role before admin approval

narrative.summary: 取消賣家申請返回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.ApplyReady 觸發 cancelSellerApplication，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: canceling seller application returns to catalog and leaves SellerApplication data unchanged

narrative.summary: 由商品列表進入商品狀態變更功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.ProductsReady 觸發 changeProductStatus，並進入 SellerProductStatusFeature.Init。

validations.description: status change is initiated only for current seller-owned products and target statuses stay within draft active inactive rules, never allowing seller-side banned control

narrative.summary: 由新增商品頁進入商品儲存功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.ProductNewDraft 觸發 createProduct，並進入 SellerProductSaveFeature.Init。

validations.description: product creation submits current seller ownership and form fields, and entering the feature cannot save a product for another seller

narrative.summary: 由編輯商品頁進入商品儲存功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.ProductEditDraft 觸發 saveProductChanges，並進入 SellerProductSaveFeature.Init。

validations.description: product update submits only current seller-owned product changes and cannot alter platform-managed fields such as platform_fee rules

narrative.summary: 由賣家子訂單詳情進入出貨功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.OrderDetailReady 觸發 shipSubOrder，並進入 SellerFulfillmentFeature.Init。

validations.description: ship action is available only when the seller owns the suborder and the suborder status is paid, not pending_payment cancelled refund_requested or refunded

narrative.summary: 由賣家子訂單詳情進入退款審核功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.OrderDetailReady 觸發 reviewRefundRequest，並進入 SellerRefundReviewFeature.Init。

validations.description: refund review action is available only for seller-owned suborders currently in refund_requested and the feature receives the current refund request context

narrative.summary: 離開賣家禁入頁返回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 SellerConsolePage.Forbidden 觸發 leaveSellerArea，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: leaving forbidden seller area returns to public catalog and seller-only navigation is no longer shown for unauthorized users

source.sectionTitle: ⑩ Admin Console Page State Machine

narrative.summary: 進入賣家申請審核頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /admin/seller-applications as admin，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.Init 進入 AdminConsolePage.SellerApplicationsReady。

validations.description: seller application list API returns 200 and shows submitted applications for admin review only

narrative.summary: 進入分類管理頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /admin/categories as admin，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.Init 進入 AdminConsolePage.CategoriesReady。

validations.description: category management API returns 200 and category rows with active inactive status are visible only to admin

narrative.summary: 進入管理訂單頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /admin/orders as admin，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.Init 進入 AdminConsolePage.OrdersReady。

validations.description: admin order query API returns 200 and can access platform-wide order records according to admin permissions

narrative.summary: 進入糾紛處理頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /admin/disputes as admin，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.Init 進入 AdminConsolePage.DisputesReady。

validations.description: dispute list API returns 200 and open resolved dispute cases are visible for admin handling only

narrative.summary: 進入退款處理頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /admin/refunds as admin，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.Init 進入 AdminConsolePage.RefundsReady。

validations.description: refund management API returns 200 and refund requests are visible for admin intervention only

narrative.summary: 進入營運分析頁
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enter /admin/analytics as admin，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.Init 進入 AdminConsolePage.AnalyticsReady。

validations.description: analytics API returns 200 and platform aggregate metrics are visible only to admin users

narrative.summary: 進入管理區權限不足狀態
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 enterAdminRouteWithoutAdminRole，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.Init 進入 AdminConsolePage.Forbidden。

validations.description: authenticated non-admin access returns 403, admin management data is hidden, and forbidden state is shown consistently

narrative.summary: 由賣家申請頁切到分類入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openCategories | navigate /admin/categories，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.SellerApplicationsReady 回到 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to admin categories and remains within admin-only navigation

narrative.summary: 由分類頁切到訂單入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openOrders | navigate /admin/orders，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.CategoriesReady 回到 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to admin orders and platform-wide query capability remains admin-only

narrative.summary: 由訂單頁切到糾紛入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openDisputes | navigate /admin/disputes，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.OrdersReady 回到 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to admin disputes and current admin scope is preserved

narrative.summary: 由糾紛頁切到退款入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openRefunds | navigate /admin/refunds，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.DisputesReady 回到 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to admin refunds and current admin scope is preserved

narrative.summary: 由退款頁切到分析入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openAnalytics | navigate /admin/analytics，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.RefundsReady 回到 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes to admin analytics and keeps admin-only visibility rules intact

narrative.summary: 由分析頁切回賣家申請入口
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 openSellerApplications | navigate /admin/seller-applications，讓流程由 AdminConsolePage.AnalyticsReady 回到 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: route changes back to seller application review and retains admin-only access control

narrative.summary: Admin Console Page 掛在 Entry 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_entry 與 page_admin_console 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 未登入進管理區導向登入
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminConsolePage.Init 觸發 enterWithoutSession，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: unauthenticated /admin/* access returns 401 and redirects to /login with no admin data exposed

narrative.summary: 由賣家申請頁進入審核功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminConsolePage.SellerApplicationsReady 觸發 reviewSellerApplication，並進入 AdminSellerApplicationReviewFeature.Init。

validations.description: review action is available only for admin and targets submitted seller applications with auditable context

narrative.summary: 由分類頁進入分類管理功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminConsolePage.CategoriesReady 觸發 manageCategory，並進入 AdminCategoryManageFeature.Init。

validations.description: category manage entry targets admin-controlled category records only and seller users cannot invoke this feature

narrative.summary: 由訂單頁進入訂單介入功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminConsolePage.OrdersReady 觸發 interveneOrder，並進入 AdminOrderInterventionFeature.Init。

validations.description: intervention entry targets an admin-selected order or suborder dispute context and records the acting admin identity for audit

narrative.summary: 由糾紛頁進入糾紛解決功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminConsolePage.DisputesReady 觸發 resolveDispute，並進入 AdminDisputeResolveFeature.Init。

validations.description: dispute resolution entry targets an open dispute case and only admin can perform the action

narrative.summary: 由退款頁進入退款介入功能
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminConsolePage.RefundsReady 觸發 decideRefund，並進入 AdminRefundInterventionFeature.Init。

validations.description: refund intervention entry targets a current refund request and only admin can approve reject or force refund with audit requirements

narrative.summary: 離開管理分析頁返回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminConsolePage.AnalyticsReady 觸發 leaveAdminArea，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: leaving admin area returns to public catalog and admin-only views are no longer active on screen

narrative.summary: 離開管理禁入頁返回商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminConsolePage.Forbidden 觸發 leaveForbiddenPage，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: forbidden admin state can return to public catalog while keeping all admin data inaccessible

narrative.summary: 送出登入驗證
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 submitCredentials，讓流程由 AuthLoginFeature.Init 進入 AuthLoginFeature.Submitting。

validations.description: authentication request is sent once, submit controls are disabled to avoid duplicate requests, and the feature transitions into submitting state

narrative.summary: 登入為買家
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 authenticatedAsBuyer，讓流程由 AuthLoginFeature.Submitting 進入 AuthLoginFeature.BuyerDone。

validations.description: auth API returns 200 with Buyer role, session is created for the authenticated user, and buyer navigation becomes available while seller and admin navigation stays hidden unless roles exist

narrative.summary: 登入為賣家
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 authenticatedAsSeller，讓流程由 AuthLoginFeature.Submitting 進入 AuthLoginFeature.SellerDone。

validations.description: auth API returns 200 with Seller role, session is created for the authenticated seller, and seller console navigation becomes visible without exposing admin navigation

narrative.summary: 登入為管理員
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 authenticatedAsAdmin，讓流程由 AuthLoginFeature.Submitting 進入 AuthLoginFeature.AdminDone。

validations.description: auth API returns 200 with Platform Admin role, session is created for the admin user, and admin navigation becomes visible

narrative.summary: 登入失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 authenticationRejected，讓流程由 AuthLoginFeature.Submitting 進入 AuthLoginFeature.Failed。

validations.description: auth API returns 401 or validation failure, no session is created, and the feature keeps the user unauthenticated with error feedback available on return

narrative.summary: AuthLoginFeature 掛在 Login Page 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_login 與 feature_auth_login 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 登入失敗返回登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.Failed 觸發 backToLogin，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to login shows the login form with authentication failure feedback and still hides protected navigation entries

narrative.summary: 買家登入後進入商品頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.BuyerDone 觸發 loginDone，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: buyer login completion routes to /, public catalog loads, and Buyer Header now shows 購物車 我的訂單 登出 without seller or admin items

narrative.summary: 賣家登入後進入賣家主控台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.SellerDone 觸發 loginDone，並進入 SellerConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: seller login completion routes to /seller/products, seller-owned product list is loaded, and seller-only navigation is visible while admin items remain hidden

narrative.summary: 管理員登入後進入管理主控台
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthLoginFeature.AdminDone 觸發 loginDone，並進入 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: admin login completion routes to /admin/seller-applications, admin review data can load, and admin navigation becomes visible

narrative.summary: 送出註冊資料
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 submitSignupForm，讓流程由 AuthSignupFeature.Init 進入 AuthSignupFeature.Submitting。

validations.description: account creation request is sent once, submit UI prevents duplicate submission, and validation is handled in the feature submission step

narrative.summary: 註冊成功
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 accountCreated，讓流程由 AuthSignupFeature.Submitting 進入 AuthSignupFeature.Done。

validations.description: signup API returns 201 or success equivalent, a new user account is created, and the resulting user can proceed to login without unexpected seller or admin role assignment

narrative.summary: 註冊失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 accountRejected，讓流程由 AuthSignupFeature.Submitting 進入 AuthSignupFeature.Failed。

validations.description: signup API returns validation failure or rejection, no new user account is persisted, and error details are available on return to the signup page

narrative.summary: AuthSignupFeature 掛在 Signup Page 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_signup 與 feature_auth_signup 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 註冊失敗返回註冊頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthSignupFeature.Failed 觸發 backToSignup，並進入 SignupPage.Init。

validations.description: signup page is restored with failure feedback and no authenticated session exists

narrative.summary: 註冊成功後前往登入頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AuthSignupFeature.Done 觸發 signupDone，並進入 LoginPage.Init。

validations.description: successful signup routes to /login and the new account can be used for authentication from the login form

narrative.summary: 送出加入購物車請求
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 submitAddToCart，讓流程由 AddCartFeature.Init 進入 AddCartFeature.Submitting。

validations.description: cart add request targets the current buyer cart, quantity is at least 1, and the product is rechecked as active and purchasable before mutation

narrative.summary: 商品已加入購物車
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 productAdded，讓流程由 AddCartFeature.Submitting 進入 AddCartFeature.Done。

validations.description: cart API returns 200, the buyer cart contains the selected product with the requested quantity, and no duplicate cart is created for another user

narrative.summary: 商品不可加入購物車
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 productUnavailable，讓流程由 AddCartFeature.Submitting 進入 AddCartFeature.Blocked。

validations.description: cart API rejects inactive draft banned or insufficient-stock products, no cart quantity is changed, and the product remains unavailable for purchase

narrative.summary: AddCartFeature 掛在 Catalog Page 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_catalog 與 feature_add_cart 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 加入購物車成功後前往購物車
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AddCartFeature.Done 觸發 addCartDone，並進入 CartPage.Init。

validations.description: navigation to /cart shows the updated current buyer cart with the added item present and quantities consistent with the successful mutation

narrative.summary: 加入購物車失敗返回商品詳情入口
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AddCartFeature.Blocked 觸發 returnToProduct，並進入 CatalogPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to product detail preserves the same product route and shows that add-to-cart could not complete without altering cart data

narrative.summary: 送出購物車異動
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 submitCartMutation，讓流程由 CartMutateFeature.Init 進入 CartMutateFeature.Updating。

validations.description: cart update request is sent once for the current buyer item, requested quantity or removal is validated, and duplicate submits are prevented during update

narrative.summary: 購物車異動成功
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 cartUpdated，讓流程由 CartMutateFeature.Updating 進入 CartMutateFeature.Done。

validations.description: cart API returns 200, item quantity or removal is persisted for the current buyer only, and remaining cart totals are recalculated consistently

narrative.summary: 購物車變成空
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 cartBecameEmpty，讓流程由 CartMutateFeature.Updating 進入 CartMutateFeature.Empty。

validations.description: cart API returns 200 and after mutation no items remain in the current buyer cart, so empty cart state becomes accurate

narrative.summary: 購物車異動被拒絕
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 quantityRejected，讓流程由 CartMutateFeature.Updating 進入 CartMutateFeature.Blocked。

validations.description: cart API rejects invalid quantity below 1 or above available stock, no unintended cart change is persisted, and buyer receives actionable feedback

narrative.summary: CartMutateFeature 掛在 Cart Page 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_cart 與 feature_cart_mutate 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 購物車更新後返回購物車頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CartMutateFeature.Done 觸發 mutationDone，並進入 CartPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to /cart shows updated items and quantities for the current buyer with no cross-user leakage

narrative.summary: 購物車清空後返回購物車頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CartMutateFeature.Empty 觸發 mutationDone，並進入 CartPage.Init。

validations.description: returning to /cart shows empty state with no checkout primary action and no stale cart rows

narrative.summary: 購物車異動被阻擋後返回購物車頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 CartMutateFeature.Blocked 觸發 mutationBlocked，並進入 CartPage.Init。

validations.description: blocked mutation returns to the same cart with original values intact and error feedback visible

narrative.summary: 開始建單與付款
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 createOrderAndPayment，讓流程由 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.Init 進入 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.Creating。

validations.description: order creation request is sent once, products are regrouped by seller_id, active status and stock are revalidated, and duplicate submission is prevented

narrative.summary: 付款成功
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 paymentSucceeded，讓流程由 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.Creating 進入 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.PaymentSucceeded。

validations.description: payment callback or completion marks Payment succeeded, creates one Order plus N seller-grouped SubOrders, sets Order to paid, sets each SubOrder to paid, deducts stock atomically, and repeated callback with the same transaction_id plus order_id does not duplicate stock deduction or status updates

narrative.summary: 付款失敗
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 paymentFailed，讓流程由 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.Creating 進入 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.PaymentFailed。

validations.description: Payment is recorded as failed, Order remains created, each SubOrder remains pending_payment, and stock is not deducted

narrative.summary: 付款取消
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 paymentCancelled，讓流程由 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.Creating 進入 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.PaymentCancelled。

validations.description: Payment is recorded as cancelled, Order remains created, each SubOrder remains pending_payment, and stock is not deducted

narrative.summary: 建單被商品或庫存阻擋
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 inventoryOrProductRejected，讓流程由 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.Creating 進入 CheckoutCreateOrderFeature.Blocked。

narrative.summary: 退款強制執行
narrative.taskDescription: 觸發 refundForced，讓流程由 AdminRefundInterventionFeature.Submitting 進入 AdminRefundInterventionFeature.Forced。

validations.description: forced refund applies the admin override, completes refund handling on the targeted refund and suborder, updates order aggregates consistently, and writes an AuditLog entry for the forced action

narrative.summary: AdminRefundInterventionFeature 掛在 Admin Console Page 之下
narrative.taskDescription: 保留 page_admin_console 與 feature_admin_refund_intervention 的階層關係。

narrative.summary: 退款核准後返回管理退款頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminRefundInterventionFeature.Approved 觸發 refundDone，並進入 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: returning to admin refunds shows the updated approved or refunded refund request and consistent suborder state

narrative.summary: 退款拒絕後返回管理退款頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminRefundInterventionFeature.Rejected 觸發 refundDone，並進入 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: returning to admin refunds shows the rejected refund request and the restored suborder state rather than refund_requested

narrative.summary: 退款強制執行後返回管理退款頁
narrative.taskDescription: 在 AdminRefundInterventionFeature.Forced 觸發 refundDone，並進入 AdminConsolePage.Init。

validations.description: returning to admin refunds shows the forced refund result, related financial and status data are consistent, and the action remains auditable
